q:
With reference to the Constitution of India, consider the following statements:
1. The Preamble is a part of the Constitution.
2. The Preamble can be amended under Article 368.

Which of the statements given above is/are correct?
subject: General Studies
expl: In Kesavananda Bharati case (1973), SC held Preamble is part of Constitution and can be amended under Art 368 without altering basic structure.

q: Which one of the following rivers flows through a rift valley in India?
subject: General Studies
expl: The Narmada and Tapti rivers flow through linear rift valleys created by tectonic faulting between the Vindhya and Satpura ranges.
